news.headline: Alta Resources praised for enhancing consumer interactions and agent efficiency. SAN ANTONIO, Oct. 10, 2024 - Frost & Sullivan recognized Alta for its market leadership, simplifying interfaces, and automating processes, ultimately improving customer experience and agent retention.
news.summary: Alta has enhanced agent interfaces and automated backend processes to enhance customer experience while increasing agent retention and satisfaction. The changes were implemented in SAN ANTONIO on October 10, 2024. Frost & Sullivan evaluated the customer experience management (CXM) sector, focusing on streamlining interfaces and backend operations.

news.headline: SeriousFun Children's Network adds Neha Aujla, Joy Errico, Emily Lamont, and Cameron Read to their Board of Directors.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - On October 10, 2024, SeriousFun Children's Network's Board of Directors happily announced the addition of four new members: Neha Aujla, Joy Errico, Emily Lamont, and Cameron Read. This charitable organization, established by the renowned actor Paul Newman, aims to provide support and hope to seriously ill children.

news.headline: FutureCeuticals shares study on CognatiQ®'s cognitive benefits, validated by Auburn University, published.
news.summary: In Momence, Illinois, on October 10, 2024, FutureCeuticals has released a new scientific article confirming the cognitive performance advantages of its patented ingredient, CognatiQ®. The research, carried out at Auburn University, showcased significant cognitive enhancement benefits. This marks another success for FutureCeuticals as they continue to innovate in the field.

news.headline: Jeff Concepcion of Stratos Wealth Partners named Hispanic CEO of the Year by Wealth Solutions Report.
news.summary: Beachwood, Ohio-based Stratos Wealth Partners (Stratos), an investment advisor under Stratos Wealth Holdings, revealed that its CEO, Jeff Concepcion, has been honored as Hispanic CEO of the Year by Wealth Solutions Report on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: VoltServer partners with Current/OS Foundation to promote DC power usage, expanding its reach and impact in the industry.
news.summary: In East Greenwich, Rhode Island, on October 10, 2024, VoltServer, a key player in fault-managed power solutions, has announced a significant partnership with the nonprofit organization Current/OS Foundation. This collaboration involves VoltServer and Current/OS Foundation, alongside their expanding consortium.

news.headline: UK's Chancellor Reeves mulls raising capital gains tax as high as 39% - Guardian.
Fission Labs raises $1.6M in pre-seed funding led by SALT Fund and Kraynos Capital, with Anthony Scaramucci participating. Launches Closed Testnet to bring VC to DeFi.
news.summary: In East Hampton, N.Y. on October 10, 2024, Fission revealed a successful pre-seed funding round of $1.6 million. The funding was spearheaded by SALT Fund and Kraynos Capital, with support from Anthony Scaramucci of Skybridge. Fission is the inaugural DeFi application designed for transferring venture capital onto the blockchain. This marks a significant milestone for the company as they officially launched their innovative platform.

news.headline: SimSpace awarded "Security Training Innovation Award" in 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards Program.
news.summary: An esteemed awards program recently honored exemplary information security products and companies on a global scale. In the city of Boston on October 10, 2024, SimSpace, a prominent US organization specializing in custom cyber ranges, proudly revealed its victory as the recipient of this prestigious accolade. The program recognized SimSpace for its exceptional contributions to the industry, solidifying its position as a leader in the field.

news.headline: Eagle Hill Consulting Employee Retention Index stable in Q3 2024, predicts declining worker turnover until 2025. Male, Millennial, Baby Boomer employees most loyal.
news.summary: According to the latest data from the Eagle Hill Consulting Employee Retention Index released on October 10, 2024, male employees, especially those from the Millennial and Baby Boomer generations, are showing higher rates of remaining with their employers. The study revealed consistent trends among government employees compared to the national figures. The index remained stable for the third quarter of 2024, indicating a strong retention rate within organizations for the period.

news.headline: Hope & Comfort Hygiene Hub launches Hygiene Insecurity Awareness Week w/ aim to distribute 500,000 products to those in need.
news.summary: Two companies, Earth Breeze and Native, are contributing to the distribution of 500,000 hygiene products for the underprivileged in NEEDHAM, Massachusetts. This initiative is led by the nonprofit organization, Hope & Comfort Hygiene Hub, which is dedicated to supplying essential hygiene products in the state. The distribution effort is scheduled to take place over the week, benefitting a significant number of individuals in need.

news.headline: FreeMove Alliance awarded "Best International Mobile Connectivity Brand, Global" at Global Brand Awards 2024 in London.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, FreeMove Alliance was honored with the "Best International Mobile Connectivity Brand, Global" award at the prestigious Global Brand Awards. This annual event, organized by Global Brands Magazine (GBM) in London, recognizes leading brands from around the world. The award highlights FreeMove Alliance's excellence in mobile connectivity on a global scale.

news.headline: Omada wins "Overall ID Management Solution of the Year" at 8th CyberSecurity Breakthrough Awards for 4th straight year.
news.summary: Omada A/S, a top provider of Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) solutions, has been honored with a prestigious award for the fourth year in a row. The company, headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, was named the winner of the "Overall ID" award. This recognition was announced on October 10, 2024. Omada's consistent success in this annual awards program showcases its industry leadership and excellence.

news.headline: Global Breach and Attack Simulation Market expected to reach USD 2,405.4 million by 2029 with 27.0% CAGR from 2024's USD 729.2 million.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of October 10, 2024, a recent report forecasts substantial growth in the global Breach and Attack Simulation Market. The market size is expected to increase from USD 729.2 million in 2024 to USD 2,405.4 million by 2029, representing a significant Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 27.0% during this period. This data indicates a strong upward trend in the industry over the next few years.

news.headline: Wells Fargo grants $3.75M for no-cost neurodiversity workshops for corporate America by UConn, focusing on education and training.
news.summary: A substantial grant worth $3.75 million has been awarded by Wells Fargo to support the University of Connecticut's Center for Neurodiversity. This initiative aims to offer complimentary education, training, academic research, and talent networking opportunities to employers. The collaboration seeks to raise awareness and foster inclusivity towards individuals with unique neurological profiles. The grant signifies a significant investment towards promoting diversity and fostering a more inclusive workforce. This partnership showcases Wells Fargo's commitment to supporting neurodiversity initiatives and advancing educational resources in this field.

news.headline: Global Sodium Ion Battery Market to hit USD 5.67 Billion by 2031, growing at 23.21% CAGR: Verified Market Research®
news.summary: Leading provider of business intelligence and market analysis, Verified Market Research®, has recently published a detailed report on the "Sodium Ion Battery Market Size and Forecast." The report delves into the dynamic landscape of the sodium ion battery market.

news.headline: Global workflow management system market projected to grow to $60.02 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 24.7% from $10.23 billion in 2023.
news.summary: In a recent report by The Insight Partners, it was revealed that the projected size of the workflow management system market is expected to increase significantly, reaching a value of US$ 60.02 billion by 2031. This marks a substantial rise from the US$ 10.23 billion recorded in 2023. The market is anticipated to witness a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.7% during the period of 2023 to 2031. The report was published in New York on October 10, 2024, offering a comprehensive analysis of the global market trends.

news.headline: Plastic Express partners with industry leaders for fleet safety, including Netradyne, Geotab, and Gridline.
news.summary: In San Diego, Netradyne, a top SaaS provider of AI and edge computing, along with Geotab, a global leader in connected vehicle solutions, and Gridline, a fleet safety company and Geotab reseller, announced the achievements of their mutual client, Plastic Express, a veteran-owned third-party logistics provider specializing in plastic resin transportation, packaging, and storage. The collaboration has demonstrated noteworthy success for Plastic Express since its inception.

news.headline: Research report on combining NDT and Dimensional Metrology for superior quality assurance shows growth potential.
news.summary: A report titled "Synergizing Non-destructive Testing (NDT) and Dimensional Metrology" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This study delves into the prospects that emerge from merging non-destructive testing (NDT) methods with dimensional metrology tools. Despite their traditional reputations, the NDT and dimensional metrology sectors have increasingly adopted Industry 4.0 technologies like digital twins, AI, AR/VR, and robotics. These advancements are being utilized in diverse applications.

news.headline: Behavox's Intelligent Archive sees 100% QoQ growth, 2nd consecutive quarter. Rapid demand for modern compliance solutions.
news.summary: In London, Behavox, a leading provider of AI-driven compliance and risk management solutions, revealed a remarkable achievement with its Intelligent Archive solution. The company reported an impressive 100% increase in customers for the second quarter in a row. Launched in January this year, the significant growth underscores a prevailing discontent within the market towards traditional providers and a rising need for contemporary compliance and archiving tools. Behavox's Intelligent Archive leverages its exclusive large language model, tailored to meet the demands of the industry.

news.headline: RotoUnderworld secures $1.5 million funding to revolutionize fantasy sports & iGaming with FastDraft mobile platform.
news.summary: A Fairfield-based tech company called RotoUnderworld disclosed on October 10, 2024, that it has secured $1.5 million in a pre-seed funding round aimed at developing an advanced fantasy gaming platform. The funding was led by...

news.headline: Inventor from Edmonton develops new electronically driven wrench to solve tool scarcity.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Pittsburgh, a service technician from Edmonton, AB, Canada expressed the challenges of facing situations without the necessary tools. The inventor highlighted the frustration of realizing that essential tools may not even exist when needed. This experience motivated them to develop a solution.

news.headline: Viral Nation partners with Wind Sun Sky to create two new 'Like Nastya' series, expanding their original content.
news.summary: In Toronto, Viral Nation, a prominent agency specializing in social media marketing and content creation, revealed their collaboration with studio partner Wind Sun Sky Entertainment to develop two new original series for renowned content creator, Like Nastya. This partnership aims to produce one live-action and one animated series for the beloved children's entertainment personality. The venture marks a significant advance for Viral Nation's scripted content initiatives and underscores Wind Sun Sky Entertainment's expansion efforts in the creative industry.

news.headline: Tornator Oyj announces issuance of EUR 300M environmentally-friendly rated notes.
New study: Patients may not see out-of-pocket drug savings from IRA; research suggests some may pay more.
news.summary: Recent research findings challenge the anticipated cost savings for Medicare beneficiaries under the Inflation Reduction Act's (IRA) drug pricing regulations. A study conducted by the IQVIA Institute for Human Data Science and commissioned by We Work For Health indicates that some patients might end up paying more at the pharmacy counter. The analysis focused on the costs for 10 selected Part D medications approved by the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. The study suggests that contrary to expectations, the actual expenses for patients could exceed initial projections.

news.headline: Jet.AI to attend 2024 NBAA-BACE on Oct 22-24, 2024 in Las Vegas Convention Center. Stock symbol: JTAI.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Jet.AI Inc. (NASDAQ: JTAI), a pioneering private aviation and artificial intelligence firm, revealed its upcoming involvement in the 2024 NBAA Business Aviation Convention & Exhibition ("NBAA-BACE") happening from October 22 to October 24, 2024, at the Las Vegas Convention Center in Las Vegas, Nevada.

news.headline: American Airlines Group will webcast Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 24, 7:30 a.m. CT for analysts and journalists.
news.summary: American Airlines Group (NASDAQ: AAL) based in Fort Worth, Texas, has announced they will be hosting a live audio webcast of their third-quarter 2024 financial results conference call. The event is scheduled for Thursday, October 24th at 7:30 a.m. Central Time. The webcast will be available for financial analysts and journalists to tune in and listen to the company's financial performance updates.

news.headline: Robert Craig Films announces nationwide distribution of film "No Address" starting Feb. 28, 2025, on World Homeless Day.
news.summary: Robert Craig Films has successfully secured nationwide distribution for their feature film "No Address" with Fathom. The film will debut in theaters across the country starting on Friday, February 28th, 2025. The announcement was made on October 10, 2024, in Sacramento, California. The move coincides with World Homeless Day, highlighting the social impact of this dramatic film.

news.headline: Evoke Advisors ranked #1 on Forbes' "America's Top RIA Firms" with $25.3 billion in assets under management.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 8, 2024, Evoke Advisors, a firm specializing in wealth advisory and investment management, secured the top spot on Forbes' "America's Top RIA Firms" list for the third consecutive year. With around $25.3 billion in assets under management, Evoke Advisors continues to demonstrate its leadership in the industry.

news.headline: CPI inflation rises, jobless claims surge, Fed not worried, S&P 500 slips. Nov. 7 rate cut likely.
news.summary: Amid a spike in jobless claims, the Federal Reserve is expected to proceed with a rate cut on Nov. 7 despite the Consumer Price Index data showing high inflation. The S&P 500 experienced a slight decline from its previous record high. This suggests that the Fed remains focused on supporting the economy despite the inflation surge.

news.headline: Northvolt's battery production in Northern Sweden has slowed down unexpectedly.
Kremlin: Putin and Iran's President to discuss Mideast situation - IFX.
Flywheel.io appoints Matthew A. Michela as CEO, replacing Hooman Hakami; leading medical imaging platform.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Flywheel.io, a prominent platform for managing and analyzing medical imaging data, revealed a change in leadership. Matthew A. Michela has taken over as the new CEO, replacing Hooman Hakami, who served as the interim CEO. This transition marks a significant shift for the company as it continues to establish its position in the industry. Flywheel.io is known for its comprehensive approach to medical imaging data management and analysis, catering to a wide range of healthcare professionals and institutions.

news.headline: Chiropractic franchise 100% debuts at No. 372 on Franchise Times Top 400 list, shows rapid growth.  #chiropractic #franchise #growth
news.summary: 100% Chiropractic, a top chiropractic care provider, has made a significant achievement by securing the No. 372 spot on the esteemed Franchise Times Top 400 list. The company, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has experienced rapid growth, leading to this milestone. This ranking is a testament to the company's success and position in the industry.

news.headline: Mimir offers AI-driven solutions to outdated language education, addressing challenges for both students and teachers. Los Angeles, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Los Angeles, there are concerns raised about the efficacy of second language learning due to outdated methods. The current traditional approach relies on costly static textbooks and obsolete materials, creating hurdles for both students and teachers. This approach fails to adapt to modern needs, hindering effective language education.

news.headline: Research report on Augmented Connected Worker (ACW) sector for 2023-2030 added on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Analysis includes segmentation by region, industry type (process, hybrid, discrete), and 18 end-user industries. Manufacturing tasks are complex, frontline workers interact with multiple systems daily.
news.summary: A report titled "Growth Opportunities in the Augmented Connected Worker Sector, Global, 2023-2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the segmentation of the Augmented Connected Worker (ACW) market based on region and industry type, which includes process, hybrid, and discrete manufacturing. Additionally, the study covers 18 various end-user industries. It highlights the growing complexity of manufacturing tasks where frontline workers are required to engage with numerous vertical systems regularly. This analysis provides valuable insights for businesses looking to capitalize on the ACW sector's expansion.

news.headline: RecNation expands in Orlando with 6th location in Fruitland Park, marking continued growth in RV storage market.
news.summary: RecNation Storage, a prominent company in the specialized recreational vehicle (RV) and boat storage industry in the US, recently finalized the acquisition of a new property in Fruitland Park, Florida. This development signifies the Company's expansion, with this being its sixth location in the Orlando market. By adding this property to its portfolio, RecNation now operates a total of six facilities in Orlando, showcasing its strong dedication to catering to the demands of recreational enthusiasts. This move aligns with RecNation's strategy to continuously grow and enhance its services for customers across the region.

news.headline: DCIM Market valued at $8.97 billion in 2023, projected to grow at 13.7% CAGR by 2030 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Global Data Center Infrastructure Management Market forecasts significant growth in the sector. Valued at USD 8.97 billion in 2023, the market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 13.7% from 2025 to 2030. The report covers market size, trends, opportunities, and forecasts based on components, data center types, offerings, regions, and countries. The Data Center Infrastructure Management market has shown promising growth trends.

news.headline: Saviynt named leader in Workforce Identity & Access Management by Frost & Sullivan in 2024 report.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Saviynt, a prominent provider of cloud-native identity and governance platform solutions, was recently recognized as a leader in the Frost & Sullivan report, specifically the 2024 Frost Radar: Workforce Identity & Access Management. The report assessed top IAM vendors in terms of their ability to safeguard organizations and their external workforces from identity-related attacks. This acknowledgment solidifies Saviynt's position in the industry and demonstrates its dedication to enhancing security measures. This recognition highlights the effectiveness of Saviynt's solutions and underscores the company's commitment to innovation and excellence in the field of identity and access management.

news.headline: Hurricane Milton caused 850,000 outages for Duke Energy Florida as a Category 3 storm hits.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on October 10, 2024, Duke Energy Florida announced a significant number of power outages totaling around 850,000 as of 8 a.m. Thursday, following the impact of Hurricane Milton as a Category 3 storm in the state. The company anticipates this number to fluctuate as affected individuals are able to safely go back home.

news.headline: Form 8.3 filed for Balanced Commercial Property Trust Limited.
CPI inflation rises, jobless claims spike, S&P 500 slips, Fed not swayed, possible rate cut on Nov. 7.
news.summary: Despite the recent surge in jobless claims, the Federal Reserve is expected to proceed with a rate cut on Nov. 7, even in light of high consumer price index data. The S&P 500 experienced a decline from its peak. This increase in jobless claims presents a substantial challenge for the Federal Reserve, especially with the latest CPI data showing high inflation levels. The market reaction is evident in the S&P 500's dip from its record high.

news.headline: DoubleVerify (DV) will introduce pre-screen controls on Meta's platforms, enhancing brand safety. Advertisers can now avoid unsuitable content before serving ads on Facebook & Instagram.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, DoubleVerify (NYSE: DV), a prominent digital media measurement and analytics software platform, revealed plans to introduce content-level pre-screen avoidance for Meta's platforms Facebook and Instagram Feed and Reels. This new tool will be added to their existing suite of independent brand safety and suitability tools. The update aims to provide advertisers with the ability to prevent their ads from appearing alongside undesirable content, safeguarding their brand reputation on Meta's platforms.

news.headline: Turkey plans to adjust inflation accounting rule to protect investments as inflation rate hit a high of 19.25%.
AFS Logistics recognized as Newsweek's top 200 Most Loved Workplaces for 2024. List by Most Loved Workplace®.
news.summary: In Shreveport, Louisiana on October 10, 2024, AFS Logistics, a top 3PL provider, proudly reveals its inclusion in Newsweek's prestigious list of America's top 200 Most Loved Workplaces®. This annual distinction, curated by Most Loved Workplace® under Best Practice Institute (BPI), celebrates exceptional workplaces nationwide.

news.headline: Datasea Inc. pre-announces FY 2025 Q1 revenue at $22.7 million, showing a 230% YoY increase.
news.summary: Today, Datasea Inc. (Nasdaq: DTSS), a digital technology company based in Nevada, revealed preliminary information regarding its financial performance. The company, specializing in advancements in acoustics high-tech and 5G AI multimodal digital technologies, announced a sneak peek of its revenue numbers for the first quarter of an undisclosed fiscal year.

news.headline: HODL FM offers latest crypto news, simplifying complex terms, becoming go-to site; a guide in blockchain and AI.
news.summary: HODL FM is a comprehensive platform aiming to be the go-to source for all things cryptocurrency-related. With the crypto industry booming and changing lives, HODL FM simplifies complex terms, offers news, updates, and serves as a guide for those interested in decentralized finance. This platform covers blockchain, cryptocurrency, daily currency prices, metaverse, AI industry updates, and more. To stay informed about the crypto universe, HODL FM on hodlfm.com is the place to be. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story.

news.headline: OneOncology completes acquisition of United Urology Group, with support from TPG and Cencora, aiming to expand urology care.
news.summary: Collaboration between OneOncology, backed by investors TPG and Cencora, aims to boost growth by enhancing comprehensive, high-value urology services in physician-owned practices and ambulatory surgery centers. By partnering with UUG, they seek to leverage a common culture of physician-driven leadership and dedication. This venture is poised to significantly expand services and reach a larger number of patients in need of specialized urological care.

news.headline: Claims now open for Fluor Corp stock losses, if bought between May 6, 2016 and Feb 17, 2020 - eligible for $14.6M payout.
news.summary: Investors who bought Fluor Corporation common stock (FLR) from May 6, 2016 to February 17, 2020, and retained it during key corrective disclosures, may qualify for compensation from a $14.6 million Fair Fund based in Seattle, as of October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Kauhale Health acquires ALMC in Ohio's Miami Valley region to lead market in memory care. Third acquisition in 2 years.
news.summary: Leading the market in memory care living accommodations, Kauhale Health, based in Westerville, Ohio, has recently acquired Symphony Centerville, a purpose-built memory care community located in Centerville, OH. This acquisition is the third in two years for Kauhale, solidifying its position in the industry. This move positions Kauhale as a key player in providing specialized memory care services, catering to the increasing demand for such accommodations.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls due to high inflation data, Tesla's pre-Robotaxi event boosts stock.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline today due to a significant inflation report. Meanwhile, Tesla saw a surge in its stock ahead of the anticipated Robotaxi event. This drop in the Dow Jones was notable as it fell due to the latest inflation figures. On the other hand, Tesla's stock rallied, indicating positive investor sentiment before the upcoming Robotaxi event.
